summary: Phase 5 testing completed successfully - Authentication system, Supplier Directory, and Historical Comparison all working perfectly with full backend API integration and frontend UI functionality
passed_tests: Authentication APIs - POST /api/auth/login, POST /api/auth/register, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/auth/logout all working with JWT tokens
Supplier Directory APIs - GET /api/suppliers, POST /api/suppliers, PUT /api/suppliers/{id}, DELETE /api/suppliers/{id} with full CRUD operations
Historical Comparison API - GET /api/dashboard/historical returning proper WoW/MoM data structure with growth percentages
Login page - sign in with owner@grillshack.nz / GrillShack2026! successfully loads dashboard
Supplier Directory UI (/suppliers) - add supplier form with contact info and product associations working
Historical Comparison UI (/historical) - WoW and MoM tabs with growth charts, tables, and snapshot cards
Sidebar displays user name (Owner) and role with functional logout button
Navigation has 21 menu items including new Phase 5 items (Suppliers, Historical)
All existing Phase 1-4 features remain intact and functional (39/39 backend tests passing)
Authentication flow - login redirects to dashboard, logout redirects to login page
User role-based access working (owner login successful)
JWT token authentication working for all protected endpoints

success_percentage.backend: 100% (39/39 tests passing including 3 new Phase 5 auth + supplier + historical endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (login, supplier directory, historical comparison, navigation, logout all working)
